title: HUD Approved Counseling Agencies * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Housing & Shelter > HUD Approved Counseling Agencies * Native American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Native American Community Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally specific homeownership coaching, education, and programming to help people buy and keep their homes, increase homeownership opportunities for Portland's Urban Native Community, and close the Native homeownership gap. Also offers financial education classes. NAYA is a HUD-approved counseling agency and an equal housing opportunity provider. 5135 NE Columbia Boulevard Portland, OR 97218 Eligibility: Unrestricted, primarily serving self-identified Native Americans Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 288-8177 Get Directions Visit Website More Details NATIVE AMERICAN YOUTH AND FAMILY CENTER HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM
